title: Lively: Warfare & Technology
description: The modpack for the survival server with me and my friends where i add a new mod every week. Customised with KubeJS
body:
Welcome to Lively: Warfare & Technology, a Minecraft modpack that blends engineering and combat. Featuring the Create Mod and Vics Point Blank, this pack brings together the best of both worlds.

# Core Features:
### [Create Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create): 
- Dive into the world of engineering with Create. Build machines, automate tasks, and create complex contraptions. Whether it's factories or mechanical systems, Create gives you the tools to innovate.

### [Point Blank](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vics-point-blank):
- Arm yourself with modern weapons. Engage in intense combat, defend your base, and dominate in PvP battles. This mod adds a realistic and thrilling combat experience.

## Custom Recipes with KubeJS:
- I've used KubeJS to tweak recipes and balance gameplay. Enjoy custom crafting paths and tailored recipes that enhance both technological and combat elements.

## Weekly Mod Additions:
Every week, I'll add new mods based on suggestions from my friends.

## License: 
MIT License is a permissive software license that places few restrictions of reuse.
